tasks.title: Scaffold Xcode project: three targets building clean
acceptance_criteria: All three targets (Somna, SomnaWidget, SomnaTests) build clean on a fresh checkout
Empty app launches in the simulator
Widget extension stub compiles and is added as a target dependency of the app
Shared file group set up for the future ActivityAttributes struct so it can belong to both app and widget targets

tasks.title: SwiftData models, versioned schema, ModelContainer wiring
acceptance_criteria: ModelContainer is constructed with SomnaSchemaV1 and a SchemaMigrationPlan actually passed into its initializer, not just declared as types
SleepSession.endDate == nil is queryable via a real #Predicate
A smoke test confirms an open session round-trips correctly

tasks.title: Repository protocols, SwiftData implementations, in-memory fakes
acceptance_criteria: Both protocols have a SwiftData-backed and an in-memory implementation
A second bedtime tap while a session is open updates that session in place rather than creating a second concurrent session
WidgetCenter.shared.reloadTimelines is called only from the repository write methods, never from a clock tick
In-memory fakes work standalone with zero ModelContainer, and are announced ready for primary_ui to build against

tasks.title: NightRecord, NightRecordAssembler, pairing/edge-case tests
acceptance_criteria: 16-hour plausibility window, orphan-closing, duplicate-tap, and a DST-fallback case are all covered by parameterized @Test cases pinned to an explicit TimeZone (never Calendar.current/TimeZone.current)
Negative or implausible durations are discarded before a NightRecord is ever created
NightRecordAssembler has zero SwiftData/persistence access — pure function only

tasks.title: CorrelationEngine actor, InsightRule implementations, threshold-gating test
acceptance_criteria: Threshold-gating test passes both branches: minNightsThreshold-1 nights yields zero .scored results, minNightsThreshold nights yields at least one
All three InsightResult cases (stillLearning, scored, noSignal) are individually reachable against constructed test data
Headline copy is associational only, never causal
Engine's public API is announced ready for primary_ui's InsightsViewModel to consume

tasks.title: Debug/seed-data path for synthetic nights
acceptance_criteria: A debug-only entry point force-feeds N synthetic nights into a repository
Using it, the Insights screen can be demonstrated transitioning from still-learning to a real scored insight without waiting real calendar weeks

tasks.title: StoreKit SubscriptionStore, PaywallViewModel, .storekit config
acceptance_criteria: Entitlement status resolves once per active scenePhase transition into an in-memory flag, never re-queried inside a view body
Product-list load failure or a hung entitlement check fails open to .free with no blocking spinner anywhere on Today
Restore Purchases calls AppStore.sync() and re-scans currentEntitlements
Transaction.updates is observed from app launch and every transaction is finished

tasks.title: HealthKitImportService (read-only, opt-in)
acceptance_criteria: Denied vs not-determined is never distinguished in any UI-facing signal
Import is only invoked from an explicit Settings opt-in tap, never at first launch
App is fully functional with zero HealthKit permission granted
NSHealthShareUsageDescription is real, specific copy

tasks.title: Design tokens, GradientBackground/gradient(for:), shared components
acceptance_criteria: gradient(for:) unit test asserts all four named band boundaries and the ~30 minute crossfade
EnergyScaleControl exposes accessibilityValue and the adjustable trait from day one, not retrofitted
All shared buttons/chips/controls enforce 44pt minimum targets structurally
Text-bearing components sit on the opaque cardSurface fill, never directly on the raw gradient

tasks.title: TodayState, TodayViewModel, Today view
acceptance_criteria: state(at:) is a pure function of (openSession, todayCheckIn, now), unit-testable through empty→preBedtime→asleep→doneForToday using in-memory repos
hasAnimatedDoneStateToday gates the checkmark animation to once per day
'I'm Awake' is never disabled regardless of elapsed duration
Correct empty state on first launch with zero data

tasks.title: InsightsViewModel, Insights view (three card compositions)
acceptance_criteria: NoSignalCard is a structurally distinct view, never a reskinned StillLearningCard
Locked per-tag cards blur bars and show an unlock affordance via an isLocked modifier on the same InsightCard type
refresh() runs off the main actor; the view keeps showing previous results until new ones land, no blocking spinner

tasks.title: HistoryViewModel/History view, RecapViewModel/Recap card/RecapDetailView + ShareLink
acceptance_criteria: History is delete-only with its own first-launch empty state
RecapData renders correctly with fewer than 7 nights of data
RecapCardContent is the single shared source used by both the embedded Today card and the full-bleed ShareLink-exported RecapDetailView

tasks.title: Settings view, Paywall entry points, root TabView/App wiring
acceptance_criteria: Non-medical disclaimer reachable from Settings
Delete-all sits behind a confirmation alert
Settings reached via a gear icon in Today's nav bar, not a tab
App compiles with every view model and environment object wired through SomnaApp.swift

tasks.title: Paywall screen wiring
acceptance_criteria: Covers loading/purchasable/purchased/restoring/load-failed states
Load-failed shows inline retry + dismiss, never a blocking spinner
Dismissing the paywall never leaves any part of Today gated

tasks.title: Live Activity (ActivityKit) lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: Starting an Activity is wrapped in try/catch that silently no-ops if Live Activities are system-disabled
Lock-screen content is generic only (countdown/target bedtime), never mood/energy/insight text
SomnaLiveActivityAttributes.swift is added to both the app and widget extension target memberships

tasks.title: WidgetKit extension: last-night's-score + target-bedtime widget
acceptance_criteria: Timeline reload is triggered only by the existing repository write-path calls to WidgetCenter.shared.reloadTimelines, no independent clock-driven reload policy added
Widget never surfaces mood/energy/insight text, only score/duration/target time

tasks.title: Integration: swap in-memory fakes for real SwiftData repositories app-wide
acceptance_criteria: Shipped app target contains zero references to the in-memory fakes
Full core loop (bedtime → wake+check-in → recap → insights) is demonstrable end-to-end via the seed-data path against real persistence

tasks.title: Final verification pass
acceptance_criteria: Clean xcodebuild across app + widget targets on a fresh checkout
XCUITest Today state-machine smoke test (empty→asleep→doneForToday) passes
Manual VoiceOver pass on EnergyScaleControl confirmed, not just code inspection
Every screen's empty/loading/success/error state manually walked through
Simulated StoreKit product-load failure confirms fail-open to free tier
Simulated HealthKit permission denial confirms full functionality with zero degradation
